extensionDescription.message: Semi-virtualize old assistant messages in long ChatGPT threads to reduce lag while keeping them restorable.

popupSubtitle.message: Semi-virtualize and lazily restore old assistant messages to reduce long-thread lag.

recentKeepCount.message: Keep the latest assistant messages expanded

keepLatestOnly.message: Keep only the latest assistant message expanded

extremeMemoryMode.message: Extreme memory-saving mode (do not cache full nodes)

notChatgptTab.message: No manageable ChatGPT conversation was detected in the current tab.

expandAll.message: Expand all collapsed messages in this thread

recollapseOld.message: Re-collapse old messages in this thread

unableReadPageState.message: Unable to read the current page state. Make sure this tab is a ChatGPT page.

expandAllConfirm.message: Expanding all will restore every collapsed assistant message in the current thread and may reintroduce a lot of DOM, which can hurt performance briefly. Continue?

resetSessionConfirm.message: This will clear manual expand, lock, and collapsed records for the current thread. Continue?

cannotExpandExtreme.message: Full restore is unavailable in extreme memory-saving mode.

extremeMemoryDisabledExpandNearby.message: Nearby restore is unavailable in extreme memory-saving mode.

expandAllToast.message: Restored {0} messages. You can revert with the previous collapsed view.

noCollapsedMessages.message: There are no collapsed messages in the current thread.

noNearbyCollapsedMessages.message: No collapsed messages were found near the current viewport.

sessionResetDone.message: Current thread state has been reset.

noPreviousCollapsedView.message: There is no previous collapsed view to restore.

recollapsedOldMessages.message: Re-applied the current collapse strategy to old messages.
